title: Trample Lightly
description: Boots enchanted with Feather Falling stops trampling crops.
body: [![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod adds additional functionality to boots enchanted with Feather Falling, by preventing trampling crops when wearing them. ## Demonstration
